title: ChatMove
description: The mod allows you to move your chat box using the in-game chat settings.
body:
The mod allows you to move your chat box using the in-game chat settings.

- Enables the use of a slider to change both the X and Y displacement from the bottom left corner of the screen

- The slider can be found in the default Minecraft chat settings

Note: It is possible to displace the chat box off the screen
